content: Prisma onDelete: Cascade is declared on the @relation attribute of the child model's FK field (e.g. PurchaseOrderLineItem.purchaseOrder relation), not the parent. Deleting the parent (PurchaseOrder) then cascades to delete all child rows (PurchaseOrderLineItem) at the DB level. Requires a migration; safe for this phase since Draft POs (the only hard-deletable state) have no dependent StockTransaction rows yet (those are only created on receipt, which requires ORDERED status first).
